description: In preparation for trial, a paralegal needs to create a list of all exhibits the party intends to use.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has a collection of all documents and physical evidence.

nodes.task_description: Create a list with columns for Exhibit Number, a brief description, and whether it has been admitted into evidence.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a structured exhibit list.

nodes.task_description: Populate the list with all the potential exhibits.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a complete list to be exchanged with the court and opposing counsel.
